title: Add ChatFlow app logo to login page

requirements.summary: Display the generated ChatFlow logo on the login page above the app name using the teal/green palette
acceptanceCriteria: A logo image is generated and stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The logo is displayed on the LoginPage component above the 'ChatFlow' app name
The logo uses teal/green colors consistent with the existing app theme
The logo renders clearly on both light and dark backgrounds
The logo has appropriate sizing and spacing so it does not crowd other login page elements

file_operations.description: Add the ChatFlow logo image above the app name heading. Reference the generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/chatflow-logo.dim_256x256.png as a static asset. Apply appropriate sizing (e.g., 80-120px width) and spacing (e.g., mb-4 or mb-6) to ensure the logo does not crowd the app name or feature list. Ensure the logo renders clearly on both light and dark backgrounds by applying appropriate styling or container background.
